text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've been, um, sort of thinking about this for a
while now. A-a long while.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: There's something "off" about this world I live in.
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's decided! The winner of the Satsuki Sho is
Meisho Doto! Meisho Doto takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho has its victor! Standing at
the peak, Meisho Doto sings of the glory of the
shield!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, oh, why?! Why must I fall to Doto in every
crucial race?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas! Is the Overlord doomed to be the perpetual
target of pity, the hero of a never-ending
tragedy? Must my fans constantly utter with
regret, "If only Doto wasn't there"?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But Opera O, I don't think I'm supposed to win
this much.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What if... the two of us have...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, there is a fair chance the two of us...

text_block_list.name: Doto and Opera O
text_block_list.text: Have switched bodies?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(It's taking me a while to wake up from this
dream, though...)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yo, Doto, whaddup? I saw that race you were in!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The way you pushed outta that cluster was way
awesome! Too cool!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: No, I'm not cool in the slightest...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It was an amazing accomplishment, Meisho Doto.
I'm quite pleased to stand by your side as equals.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Our names will be recited by future generations
to come. I imagine there will be much talk
debating which one of us was the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeep! You f-flatter me far too much!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Doto! Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what's all that noise?!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Would you look at that! The star of the parade is
finally here, folks! Give it up for Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She is the reigning champion of the Satsuki Sho,
spring and fall Tenno Sho, and the Japan Cup.
Not to mention her victories at the Takarazuka
and Arima Kinen Grand Prix races!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
With such tremendous accomplishments, she has
earned the title of...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: The Centurial Tempest!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah?! Th-th-th-that's g-going too far!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Traineeeer! Oh, Traineeer!
choice_data_list: Are you okay? Here, this way!
Are you okay? Here, this way!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay. Ohhh... Thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Things should be okay... now?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Doto? Doto? Stay with us, Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh... is that you, Opera O? And Trainer...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What a relief... You've finally come to your
senses.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so it was a dream after all... Hahhh, thank
goodness.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was caught by complete surprise. You fell
unconscious during your celebratory parade.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! So it wasn't a dream?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, why are you behaving so flabbergasted?
Your standing is one above mine—a king to reign
over all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Have confidence in your feats, and stand tall and
proud, O Doto, you figure of respect.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh... respect?
choice_data_list: I'll support you, through thick and thin.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So... I really am as great as everyone says.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This all feels a little strange. But I'm happy to
have earned Opera O's respect.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So... I'll try to live up to everyone's expectations.
I promise to do my very best!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll win over and over again, as much as I can to
become the greatest star that wows them all!

This is certainly not a dream. Awakened to her
full potential, she is living history.
